title: Fusion LCOE vs. Renewables and Fission (2020-2050)
executive_question: How does fusion's projected cost compare to existing low-carbon technologies?
required_metrics: Fusion LCOE projections ($/MWh) for 2020-2050
Solar PV LCOE ($/MWh) historical and forecast
Onshore wind LCOE ($/MWh) historical and forecast
Nuclear fission LCOE ($/MWh) historical and forecast
preferred_sources: Lazard Levelized Cost of Energy Analysis
data_quality_rule: Use only publicly available LCOE estimates; note if fusion projections are company-provided vs. independent.

title: Cumulative Private Investment in Fusion (2010-2024)
executive_question: Is investor confidence growing or plateauing?
required_metrics: Annual private fusion investment ($M) from 2010 to 2024
Cumulative private fusion investment ($B) by year
data_quality_rule: Cross-reference at least two sources; exclude government grants unless specified as private.

title: Fusion Project Timeline: Key Milestones vs. Delays
executive_question: Are fusion projects on track or consistently delayed?
required_metrics: Planned milestone dates for ITER, SPARC, STEP, etc.
Actual milestone achievement dates
Delay duration (years) per milestone
comparison_set: Planned vs. actual for major projects
preferred_sources: UK Atomic Energy Authority STEP timeline
data_quality_rule: Use only official project announcements; note if delays are confirmed by independent sources.

title: Policy Support for Fusion by Country (2024)
executive_question: Which governments are providing the most support?
required_metrics: Government fusion R&D funding ($M) per country (2024)
Tax credit or subsidy value for fusion ($M)
Regulatory framework existence (binary or score)
comparison_set: US, EU, UK, Japan, China, South Korea
search_queries: EU fusion research budget Horizon Europe
data_quality_rule: Use official government budget documents; note if tax credits are proposed vs. enacted.

title: Fusion Startup Landscape: Funding, Stage, and Technology
required_metrics: Total funding raised ($M) per startup
Development stage (e.g., concept, prototype, reactor)
Technology type (tokamak, stellarator, inertial, etc.)
data_quality_rule: Use latest available funding data; stage classification based on company announcements.

title: Global Electricity Generation and Fusion Penetration Scenarios
executive_question: What share of electricity could fusion supply by 2050?
required_metrics: Global electricity generation (TWh) historical and forecast 2020-2050
Fusion electricity generation (TWh) under optimistic and pessimistic scenarios
preferred_sources: BP Statistical Review of World Energy
data_quality_rule: Use IEA or BP as base; fusion scenarios from expert elicitation or company projections.

title: Fusion Cost Competitiveness: CAPEX and OPEX Trends
executive_question: How do fusion capital and operating costs compare to other technologies?
required_metrics: Fusion plant CAPEX ($/kW) projections
Fusion plant OPEX ($/MWh) projections
Solar PV CAPEX ($/kW) historical and forecast
Nuclear fission CAPEX ($/kW) historical
preferred_sources: IEA Projected Costs of Generating Electricity
data_quality_rule: Use public cost databases; fusion CAPEX from company reports with clear assumptions.
